name: seo-rescue
description: SEO recovery skills + orchestrator. Type /seo-rescue:rescue for the routing table. NEW in v0.5.4: Recovery Hardening — spec/schema/script reconciliation (score engine now matches its spec), stage state machine + quiet-death detection + pre-hit baseline selection (experimental N=1), knocking-at-the-door cohort finder in recovery-diagnose, path-portable skills via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT, three CI consistency checks. Recovery workflow: /seo-rescue:recovery-full (diagnose → crawl → audit → plan → monitor) plus recovery-diagnose, recovery-crawl, recovery-audit, recovery-plan, recovery-monitor. Plus: seo-audit-free, post-core-update-recovery, seo-outreach-report, channel-economics-analyzer, competitor-deep-audit, psi-weekly-cron-baseline, ai-search-rescue, ai-citations-tracker, gsc-deep-dive, sistrix-monday-recovery-check, subscription-monetization-audit.
